notes: Well-polished Breakout with good mechanics and visuals, but `extraGiven` is used without declaration causing a ReferenceError when score reaches 200, breaking the extra-life bonus feature.

Game looks great and plays well initially, but suffers from a fatal ReferenceError crash at 200 points (undeclared 'extraGiven' variable) and keyboard controls become permanently disabled if the mouse is moved.

Looks and mostly behaves like Breakout, but a likely runtime bug from using titleBall.r before initialization plus awkward game-over restart flow and some collision/extra-life logic issues keep it well short of a polished build.
